visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene is set in a brightly lit, modern airport arrival hall. Two women stand in the foreground; one wears a beige cap and blue denim outfit, while the other has black hair with bangs, wearing a grey jacket and white lace gloves. They are talking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. (2) The camera cuts to a security monitor view showing people with luggage exiting a gate. Zoom-in effects and graphic frames highlight a specific person in a blue outfit. (3) The scene shifts to a tracking shot following the woman in the blue denim outfit from behind as she walks through the wide airport terminal. The lighting is bright and even. (4) Multiple people, including the woman in the grey jacket, suddenly run towards the target. They quickly throw a large white cloth bag with colorful polka dots over the target's head and upper body. (5) The group leads the 'kidnapped' person through the airport and into a hallway. A woman in a light blue suit holds a poster featuring a person's photo and the text 'Today is my birthday'. (6) Inside a room, a large group of people wearing paper masks of the same male face are gathered. They clap and cheer as the target is brought in and the cloth is removed. A man in a striped polo shirt and white cap peeks out from behind a door, holding a smartphone to record the scene.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main creators (the planners and the target), 1 husband at the end, 2 children running in the airport, and a group of approximately 12 friends in the surprise room.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has black hair with bangs, wearing a grey patterned jacket over a white lace top. The target woman wears a blue denim jumpsuit and a beige cap initially. A man at the end wears a multi-colored horizontal striped polo shirt and a white baseball cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a spacious, white-tiled airport arrival hall with 'Arrival Hall' signage and monitors. It transitions to a corridor and eventually an indoor room with cartoon posters on the walls and a white interior.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic BGM starts immediately. A female voice speaks with high energy and rapid articulation, explaining a plan. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. The music becomes slightly more suspenseful with a rhythmic bass line. Voices are muffled as if whispering. (3) A loud 'pop' sound effect occurs as the cloth bag is thrown. High-pitched female screaming and chaotic laughter dominate the audio. (4) Rapid percussive beats match the running footsteps. A comic 'boing' or spring-like SFX sounds during the chase. (5) Transition to a new indoor environment marked by a bell-like 'ding'. The music shifts to a celebratory, brass-heavy pop track. (6) Sustained high-volume group cheering and rhythmic clapping 'Yay!' sounds. A male voice at the end speaks with a humorous, rising intonation, punctuated by a final cartoonish 'honk' sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Preparation -> Execution -> Climax -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share a humorous and elaborate birthday surprise/prank where friends 'kidnap' the birthday girl from the airport and bring her to a surprise party. The video uses fast-paced editing, variety-show style graphics, and energetic audio to create an entertaining and celebratory atmosphere.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of on-screen graphics and sound effects typical of Taiwanese 'Variety Show' style editing, which significantly drives the comedic tone.
